description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named compile and test that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow checks if a job should be skipped using fkirc/skip-duplicate-actions and then runs multiple jobs on different environments (ubuntu-2004, ubuntu-2204, archlinux-gcc, archlinux-clang-clazy, archlinux-clang-tidy, archlinux-without-optional, fedora34, opensuse-tumbleweed, neon-qt6) with various steps including checking out code, configuring, building, and testing.
